channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: D: D: Demonstration
item.description: Line D: Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: Demonstration. [On 22.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line D: Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: Demonstration.
[On 22.05.2026]

item.title: U1: Delays
item.description: Irregular intervals towards Leopoldau. Reason: Harmful vehicle. [On 22.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Irregular intervals towards Leopoldau. Reason: Harmful vehicle.
[On 22.05.2026]

item.title: 22A: Traffic congestion

item.title: 41: Disability due to rescue operation
